name: ia-lessons
description: Information-architecture skills for documentation corpora: corpus discovery, content-model inference, vocabulary/taxonomy governance, and terminology audits for human-facing docs and SDD specs.

plugins.name: markdown-ia
plugins.description: Information-architecture analysis for Markdown documentation corpora: corpus discovery (file counts, structure, freshness, gaps), content-model inference (document types, schemas, metadata rules), and vocabulary/taxonomy governance (terminology and tagging consistency).

plugins.name: terminology-audit
plugins.description: Audit technical/engineering docs or spec-driven-development (SDD) spec files for inconsistent terminology and produce a termbase and a written audit report.
